ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Please Save Your Work
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Please be informed that the corporate VPN will undergo maintenance on 25th August 2024 from 11:00 PM to 1:30 AM IST. During this window, VPN services will be unavailable. Kindly save your work and log off before the maintenance starts.

For any urgent connectivity requirements, please use the temporary access link: <URL>.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Support Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Zoom/Teams Meeting Invite – Verify Now
spam.body:
Hi [Name],

We received a request from your account to schedule a Zoom/Teams meeting. To ensure security and to confirm the details, please click the link below to verify the meeting invitation:

<URL>

The meeting is set for 15th August 2024 at 10:30 AM IST. Please join promptly to avoid any delays.

Best,
Support Team
